text:
There was once a lonely old owl who had no friends.

She went out at dusk each night to look for insects to eat. She often stopped at the old oak tree across the street.

One day, the owl was fluttering around looking for food when she noticed a girl humming a soft song while walking her dog.

The dog went up to the owl and barked threateningly. The owl couldn't help but laugh. The girl smiled, and they started chatting.

Over time, they became friends. The tall girl taught the small owl some dancing moves. The owl taught her how to play cricket.

Every weekend, they'd meet up at the oak tree. The girl taught the owl how to play the guitar. They sang and danced all night long.

They stayed friends for decades. The old owl never went hungry again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
